title: APEX WAVE_MAP.json
description: Pre-computed parallel execution plan generated by architect. Read by execute-phase and /apex:next via WAVE_MAP.waves[N].tasks access pattern.

oneOf.description: Legacy task entry — bare task ID. Kept for backward compatibility with WAVE_MAP files generated before R5-013.
Object form (R5-013) — task ID plus optional ownership declaration. The owner-guard hook reads owns_files to enforce one-file-one-owner during parallel wave execution.

owns_files.description: R5-013: paths the task is allowed to write within this wave. Glob-friendly. Use ["*"] for sole-task waves to opt out of ownership gating. OPTIONAL during the R5-013 transition window — when absent, owner-guard advisory mode does not block.
